name: Classic Oversized — Black
description: Our most popular drop-shoulder silhouette. Heavy 220 GSM cotton, pre-shrunk, structured collar. Built for print. The go-to blank canvas for brands, events, and collectives.

reviews.name: Rahul S.
reviews.comment: Quality is insane for the price. Ordered 100 for our startup event — everyone was hyped.

reviews.name: Priya M.
reviews.comment: The 220 GSM weight feels premium. Our brand merch has never looked this good.

reviews.name: Arjun K.
reviews.comment: Great fabric, true to size. Print quality was sharp and didn't crack after washes.

name: Classic Oversized — White
description: Same legendary drop-shoulder cut, now in clean white. Pre-washed for dimensional stability. Perfect base for vibrant all-over prints or bold chest graphics.

reviews.name: Sneha T.
reviews.comment: Pure white that stays white — minimal shrinkage even after multiple washes.

reviews.name: Vikram R.
reviews.comment: Perfect for our college fest. Ordered 200 pieces, delivered on time.

reviews.name: Aditi P.
reviews.comment: The all-over print popped incredibly on this white base. Factory-direct pricing is unbeatable.

name: Drop Shoulder — Terracotta
description: Earthy terracotta in a wide boxy silhouette. 200 GSM pre-shrunk cotton with a soft hand-feel. Ships print-ready or as a blank for your own production.

reviews.name: Rohan D.
reviews.comment: The terracotta colour is rich and earthy — exactly what we needed for our streetwear label.

reviews.name: Meera J.
reviews.comment: Boxy fit is true to style. Lightweight enough for summer wear.

reviews.name: Karan B.
reviews.comment: Ordered blanks, did our own printing. Fabric held the ink perfectly.

name: Heavyweight Oversized — Navy
description: Our heaviest weight — 240 GSM structured cotton for brands that want a substantial, premium feel. Holds shape perfectly. Ideal for embroidery and high-detail prints.

reviews.name: Dev S.
reviews.comment: This is what a premium blank feels like. The 240 GSM weight is exceptional.

reviews.name: Neha K.
reviews.comment: Ordered for a corporate gifting project. Embroidery quality was flawless.

reviews.name: Anil V.
reviews.comment: Heavy and structured. Exactly what you'd expect at this GSM.

name: Graphic Tee — Abstract Waves
description: Lightweight 180 GSM graphic tee designed for all-day comfort. Pre-loaded with an abstract wave print or order as blank canvas. Slim-to-regular fit with ribbed collar.

reviews.name: Zara H.
reviews.comment: The all-over print quality is restaurant-grade. Super light for summer.

reviews.name: Sahil M.
reviews.comment: Great for events. Lightweight, vibrant print, comfortable fit.

reviews.name: Tina R.
reviews.comment: My whole team wore these at the launch. Got so many compliments.

name: Graphic Tee — City Vibes
description: Urban-inspired graphic tee in 200 GSM mid-weight cotton. Structured ribbed collar, double-needle hems. Order with our City Vibes graphic or with your own custom artwork.

reviews.name: Kabir P.
reviews.comment: Mid-weight cotton with a great drape. The chest print registration was pixel-perfect.

reviews.name: Ananya S.
reviews.comment: Solid fabric and color accuracy. Will order again for our next drop.

reviews.name: Ritesh T.
reviews.comment: Fast turnaround and great quality control. Every piece was consistent.

name: Essential Polo — Black
description: Classic pique polo in 200 GSM cotton. Three-button placket, ribbed collar and cuffs. The standard for corporate gifting, team uniforms, and brand merchandise.

reviews.name: Ravi L.
reviews.comment: Perfect for our office uniform program. Embroidery quality was impeccable.

reviews.name: Deepa M.
reviews.comment: Our employees loved these. Premium feel at a factory-direct price.

reviews.name: Sandeep G.
reviews.comment: Good quality, structured collar holds its shape well after washes.

name: Essentials Basic — Sand
description: No-frills essentials tee in warm sand. 180 GSM lightweight cotton for everyday wear. Clean construction, minimal design. The staple blank your wardrobe needs.

reviews.name: Priya A.
reviews.comment: Perfect lightweight tee. The sand colour is exactly as shown.

reviews.name: Harsh S.
reviews.comment: Great blanks for our printing studio. Consistent quality batch after batch.

reviews.name: Pooja N.
reviews.comment: Super comfortable, minimal and clean. Exactly what I ordered for our merch store.
